items.name: Fenugreek Seeds
items.example: Fenugreek seeds have a slightly bitter taste.

items.name: Star Anise
items.example: Star anise gives the broth its distinct flavor.

items.example: Masoor dal cooks faster than most other lentils.

items.name: Kidney Beans (Rajma)
items.example: Rajma with rice is a favorite Sunday meal.

items.name: Wake Up
items.example: I wake up at six every morning.

items.name: Yawn
items.example: She yawned during the long meeting.

items.example: He stretched his arms after sitting for hours.

items.name: Bend
items.example: Please bend your knees before you lift the box.

items.name: Sit

items.name: Stand Up

items.name: Blink

items.example: He smiled warmly when he saw his friends.

items.example: The whole class laughed at the joke.

items.name: Cry
items.example: The baby began to cry when she woke up.

items.name: Nod (Yes)
items.example: He nodded to show he understood.

items.name: Shake Head (No)
items.example: She shook her head to say no.

items.name: Wave
items.example: She waved goodbye from across the street.

items.name: Clap
items.example: The audience clapped after the performance.

items.name: Point
items.example: He pointed at the map to show the way.

items.name: Swallow
items.example: He took a sip of water and swallowed slowly.

items.name: Chew
items.example: She chewed her food slowly and carefully.

items.name: Bite
items.example: He took a big bite of the apple.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="58" cy="40" r="16" fill="#4F46E5" opacity="0.15"/><path d="M40 40 a16 16 0 1 0 32 -8 a10 10 0 0 1 -14 12 z" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M22 50 q6 -6 12 0 q-2 8 -12 8 q-4 -4 0 -8 z" fill="none" stroke-width="4"/></g></svg>

items.name: Breathe (Deep Breath)
items.example: Take a deep breath and relax your shoulders.

items.name: Sigh
items.example: She sighed and put down her pen.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="50" cy="30" r="10" fill="none"/><path d="M44 32 h12" stroke-width="3"/><line x1="50" y1="40" x2="46" y2="66"/><path d="M62 30 q10 4 16 0" stroke-width="3"/></g></svg>

items.name: Whisper
items.example: She whispered the secret into his ear.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="34" cy="34" r="10" fill="none"/><path d="M40 38 q10 4 6 12" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="70" cy="40" r="10" fill="none" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M62 40 q4 -6 8 -4" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.4"/></g></svg>

items.name: Shout
items.example: He shouted across the field to get her attention.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="50" cy="40" r="16" fill="none"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="48" rx="8" ry="10" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M70 30 l10 -4 M74 40 l12 0 M70 50 l10 4" stroke-width="3"/></g></svg>

items.name: Wink
items.example: He gave a quick wink and smiled.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="50" cy="46" r="20" fill="none"/><path d="M38 42 q4 4 8 0" stroke-width="4"/><circle cx="58" cy="42" r="2" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M40 56 Q50 62 60 56"/></g></svg>

items.name: Frown
items.example: She frowned when she heard the bad news.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="50" cy="46" r="20" fill="none"/><circle cx="42" cy="42" r="2" fill="#4F46E5"/><circle cx="58" cy="42" r="2" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M38 36 q4 -4 8 -2 M54 34 q4 -2 8 2" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M40 62 Q50 54 60 62"/></g></svg>

items.name: Shrug
items.example: He shrugged, not knowing the answer.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="50" cy="24" r="8" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M50 32 q0 6 0 10" /><path d="M50 40 q-24 -4 -30 12 M50 40 q24 -4 30 12"/><line x1="50" y1="42" x2="50" y2="70"/><line x1="50" y1="70" x2="40" y2="90"/><line x1="50" y1="70" x2="60" y2="90"/></g></svg>

items.name: Kneel
items.example: He knelt down to tie his shoelace.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="40" cy="24" r="8" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M40 32 v20 M40 40 L58 46"/><path d="M40 52 L30 70 L44 70 M30 70 L30 84"/></g></svg>

items.name: Crawl
items.example: The baby began to crawl across the floor.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="26" cy="52" r="8" fill="#4F46E5"/><path d="M34 54 L60 50 M60 50 L74 34 M60 50 L70 66 M34 54 L30 70 M34 54 L44 72"/></g></svg>

items.name: Jump
items.example: The children jumped with excitement.
items.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="100" height="100" rx="20" fill="#EEF0FA"/><g stroke="#4F46E5" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="50" cy="24" r="8" fill="#4F46E5"/><line x1="50" y1="32" x2="50" y2="54"/><line x1="50" y1="38" x2="34" y2="30"/><line x1="50" y1="38" x2="66" y2="30"/><line x1="50" y1="54" x2="38" y2="70"/><line x1="50" y1="54" x2="62" y2="70"/><path d="M30 84 q20 8 40 0" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.4"/></g></svg>
